errors.app-already-initialized: By Merlin's beard! This realm has already been conjured!
errors.app-not-initialized: Hold your horses, adventurer! We haven't even set up camp yet!
errors.invalid-password: Ah! That's not the magic word. Try again, with more mystique!
errors.network-error: The ethereal network is tangled! Unable to send carrier pigeons!
errors.unauthorized: Stop right there! You shall not pass without the proper incantation!
errors.unknown-error: We've stumbled into uncharted territory! An unknown enigma has occurred!
errors.validation-folder-name-already-exists: By the ancient archives! This folder name is already taken in our scrolls. Try a name not yet written in legend!
errors.validation-folder-name-invalid: This folder name is as mythical as a unicorn! Please choose another.
errors.validation-folder-name-too-long: Even the longest scroll in the kingdom isn't this long! Shorten the folder name, brave scribe.
errors.validation-folder-name-too-short: This folder name is shorter than a gnome's beard! Please elongate it.
errors.validation-name-too-long: Your name rivals the length of ancient dragons! Please shorten it.
errors.validation-name-too-short: Is that a name or an incantation? It's too short for us mere mortals!
errors.validation-object-id-invalid: This object ID is as elusive as a leprechaun! Check and try again.
errors.validation-password-too-short: Your secret phrase must be longer to keep the dragons at bay!

alerts.app-initialization-success: Huzzah! The scrolls have unfurled and the magic is alive! Your journey through the mystical realm begins!
